statement: In every magma, Equation 974 (`x = y * ((z * y) * (w * z))`) implies Equation 3963 (`x * y = (y * (y * x)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0901
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z y) (op w z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y (op y x)) z)
